2606.30702.title: Accelerometry-Derived Digital Biomarkers for Cardiometabolic Risk: A Population-Representative Tabular Benchmark with Uncertainty Quantification
2606.30702.paper_summary: Structured tabular data dominates clinical medicine, yet existing benchmarks fail to reflect real-world properties like complex survey sampling, demographic oversampling, and subgroup fairness. We introduce the NHANES Accelerometry Cardiometabolic Benchmark, derived from NHANES 2003-2006, comprising 1,381 adults with hip-worn accelerometry, fasting laboratory biomarkers, dietary intake, and anthropometrics. We evaluate three tabular learning methods -- ridge regression, XGBoost, and the foundation model TabPFN v2 -- to predict glycated haemoglobin (HbA1c), fasting triglycerides, and C-reactive protein (CRP) from activity phenotypes and lifestyle covariates. TabPFN v2 achieves the best overall performance (HbA1c R^2=0.156, CRP R^2=0.383), while triglycerides remain largely unpredictable (R^2 < 0.05), consistent with known genetic dominance. We apply split conformal prediction to generate distribution-free 90% prediction intervals and evaluate demographic coverage equity across sex and race/ethnicity subgroups. Marginal coverage aligns with the 90% target for CRP and HbA1c but falls below for triglycerides. At the subgroup level, we observe localized undercoverage (e.g., HbA1c for Mexican American participants), illustrating the gap between marginal guarantees and the conditional coverage required for clinical fairness. Code and data are at https://github.com/felizzi/nhanes-accel-cardiometabolic-benchmark.
2606.30702.paper_summary_zh: 結構化的表格數據主導臨床醫學，然而現有的基準無法反映現實世界的特性，如複雜的調查抽樣、人口過度抽樣和子群體公平性。我們介紹了NHANES加速度計心血管代謝基準，該基準源自NHANES 2003-2006，包含1,381名佩戴臀部加速度計的成年人，並收集了空腹實驗室生物標誌物、飲食攝入和人體測量數據。我們評估了三種表格學習方法——脊迴歸、XGBoost和基礎模型TabPFN v2——以預測糖化血紅蛋白（HbA1c）、空腹甘油三酯和C反應蛋白（CRP），這些預測基於活動表型和生活方式協變量。TabPFN v2實現了最佳的整體表現（HbA1c R^2=0.156，CRP R^2=0.383），而甘油三酯的預測仍然相對不可預測（R^2 < 0.05），這與已知的遺傳優勢一致。我們應用分割一致性預測生成無分佈的90%預測區間，並評估性別和種族/族裔子群體之間的人口覆蓋公平性。邊際覆蓋與CRP和HbA1c的90%目標一致，但甘油三酯則低於該目標。在子群體層面，我們觀察到局部的低覆蓋（例如，墨西哥裔美國參與者的HbA1c），這突顯了邊際保證與臨床公平所需的條件覆蓋之間的差距。代碼和數據可在https://github.com/felizzi/nhanes-accel-cardiometabolic-benchmark找到。
2606.30702.author: Federico Felizzi et.al.
